ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trails" (
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trail */,
  "trail_name" TEXT /* Name of the ski trail */,
  "is_area" INTEGER /* Indicates if the entry is a ski area or a specific trail */,
  "difficulty" REAL /* Difficulty rating of the trail */,
  "difficulty_modifier" REAL /* Modifier for the difficulty rating */,
  "steepest_pitch" REAL /* Steepest pitch on the trail */,
  "vertical_drop" REAL /* Vertical drop of the trail */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the trail */,
  "start_point" TEXT /* Start point of the trail */,
  "end_point" TEXT /* End point of the trail */,
  "average_slope" REAL /* Average slope of the trail */,
  "elevation_change" REAL /* Total elevation change along the trail */,
  "seasonal_availability" TEXT /* Seasonal availability of the trail */,
  "trail_type" TEXT /* Type of the trail (beginner, intermediate, advanced, expert) */,
  "trail_category" TEXT /* Category of the trail (freestyle, alpine, cross-country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trail_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trail_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition update */,
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trail being updated */,
  "snow_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the snow on the trail */,
  "grooming_status" TEXT /* Status of grooming on the trail */,
  "closure_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the trail is temporarily closed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Current weather conditions on the trail */,
  "recent_updates" TEXT /* Recent updates to the trail */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Maintenance status of the trail */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility on the trail */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Current temperature on the trail */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trail_conditions_trail_id FOREIGN KEY ("trail_id") REFERENCES trails ("trail_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skier_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trail that was used */,
  "skier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the skier who used the trail */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the trail was used */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the trail was used by the skier */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trail usage */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trail usage */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trail usage */,
  "skill_level" TEXT /* Skill level of the skier at the time of usage */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* Device ID used to track the usage */,
  "favorite_trail" INTEGER /* Indicates if the trail is a favorite for the skier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skier_usage_skier_id FOREIGN KEY ("skier_id") REFERENCES skiers ("skier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skier_usage_trail_id FOREIGN KEY ("trail_id") REFERENCES trails ("trail_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skiers" (
  "skier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skier */,
  "skier_name" TEXT /* Name of the skier */,
  "skill_level" TEXT /* Skill level of the skier */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the skier */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the skier */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information of the skier */,
  "membership_type" TEXT /* Type of membership (e.g., annual, seasonal) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the skier joined the resort */,
  "favorite_trails" TEXT /* Favorite trails of the skier */,
  "total_visits" INTEGER /* Total number of visits to the resort */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_program" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program entry */,
  "skier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the skier who earned points */,
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trail where points were earned */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Points earned for the achievement */,
  "achievement_date" TEXT /* Date when the achievement was earned */,
  "milestone" TEXT /* Specific milestone achieved */,
  "reward" TEXT /* Reward for the achievement */,
  "redemption_status" TEXT /* Redemption status of the reward */,
  "redemption_date" TEXT /* Date when the reward was redeemed */,
  "next_milestone" TEXT /* Next milestone the skier is working towards */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loyalty_program_trail_id FOREIGN KEY ("trail_id") REFERENCES trails ("trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loyalty_program_skier_id FOREIGN KEY ("skier_id") REFERENCES skiers ("skier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trail_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trail that was reviewed */,
  "skier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the skier who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the skier */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment written by the skier */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "rating_breakdown" TEXT /* Detailed breakdown of the rating (e.g., difficulty, scenery, grooming) */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes received by the review */,
  "photos" TEXT /* Photos uploaded by the skier */,
  "videos" TEXT /* Videos uploaded by the skier */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Device used to submit the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trail_reviews_skier_id FOREIGN KEY ("skier_id") REFERENCES skiers ("skier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trail_reviews_trail_id FOREIGN KEY ("trail_id") REFERENCES trails ("trail_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trail_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each map entry */,
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trail displayed on the map */,
  "map_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the trail map */,
  "map_data" TEXT /* Binary data representing the interactive map */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the trail */,
  "trail_markers" TEXT /* Key points along the trail (e.g., rest areas, first aid stations) */,
  "geolocation_data" TEXT /* Real-time geolocation data for the trail */,
  "map_layers" TEXT /* Different layers of information (e.g., trail difficulty, elevation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trail_map_trail_id FOREIGN KEY ("trail_id") REFERENCES trails ("trail_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trail_safety" (
  "safety_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each safety entry */,
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trail for which safety information is provided */,
  "safety_notes" TEXT /* Notes on safety precautions for the trail */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information for the trail */,
  "warning_signs" TEXT /* Specific warning signs along the trail */,
  "first_aid_stations" TEXT /* Locations of first aid stations */,
  "safety_guidelines" TEXT /* Safety guidelines for the trail */,
  "emergency_services" TEXT /* Contact information for emergency services */,
  "safety_checkpoints" TEXT /* Safety checkpoints along the trail */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("safety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trail_safety_trail_id FOREIGN KEY ("trail_id") REFERENCES trails ("trail_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trail_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trail with historical data */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the trail data */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made to the trail */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the changes were made */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Detailed notes about the changes made in each version */,
  "change_author" TEXT /* Author who made the changes */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the changes */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the changes were approved */,
  "rollback_option" TEXT /* Indicates if the changes can be rolled back */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trail_history_trail_id FOREIGN KEY ("trail_id") REFERENCES trails ("trail_id")
)
